title: [Screenful] Time tracking columns are now supported in Analytics & Reports
excerpt:
Hi folks, we’ve been busy improving our Monday integration and we’re happy to share that you can now use data from Time tracking columns in your Screenful charts and reports :partying_face: 
:point_right: Create custom c…

posts.author: sl1nna (Sami Linnanvuo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi folks, we’ve been busy improving our Monday integration and we’re happy to share that you can now use data from Time tracking columns in your Screenful charts and reports

Create custom charts including line charts and bar charts
Track time logged both on top level and subtasks
See how much time was logged by each individual
Slice & dice by date range and filters
Place charts in Monday dashboard or schedule to be sent via email
Export data in csv or json

Learn more from the blog post or start a free trial

posts.author: Pray59 (Patti Ray)
posts.cookedHtml: Does this app pull data from within the time tracking log such that I can run a report based on different dates and persons from within one time tracking cell?

posts.author: sl1nna (Sami Linnanvuo)
posts.cookedHtml:
@Pray59 yes, you can create reports based on time logged by individual members within a specified date range, within a single time tracking column. It is explained in this guide:

screenful.com

Creating charts based on time tracking data - Screenful Guide for monday.com

Learn about Creating charts based on time tracking data. Screenful is an all-in-one productivity analytics app for monday.com featuring automatic tracking, visualization, and sharing projects’ data. Take the next step in understanding how work gets...

posts.author: Pray59 (Patti Ray)
posts.cookedHtml: Our Time Tracking is in subitems. Is this possible?

posts.author: sl1nna (Sami Linnanvuo)
posts.cookedHtml:
@Pray59 yes you can track time on subitems as well. You just have to import subitems as separate data sources as described on this guide:

screenful.com
